prompt: Use the generate_code_from_image tool to convert a design image to HTML/Tailwind code
expected_behavior: Tool should delegate to parent agent, wait for response, and return generated HTML/Tailwind code in markdown format
success_criteria: Response contains metadata (image name, temperature, size)

expected_behavior: Tool validates image path exists, delegates vision work to parent subagent, returns complete HTML implementation
success_criteria: Response includes complete HTML with Tailwind classes
Code includes exact text from screenshot

prompt: Generate 4 variants from a design image with different temperatures
expected_behavior: Tool generates multiple variants sequentially with temperatures 0.7, 0.8, 0.9, 1.0
success_criteria: All variants returned in single response
Each variant shows temperature and code size

expected_behavior: Tool validates input and rejects invalid image path before delegation
success_criteria: Returns error message about image not found

expected_behavior: Tool validates temperature is within 0.0-2.0 range
success_criteria: Error message mentions valid temperature range

expected_behavior: Tool validates image file extension is PNG/JPG/JPEG/WEBP

prompt: What tools are available for visual-to-code?
expected_behavior: MCP exposes generate_code_from_image and generate_variants tools

prompt: Generate code from design.png but parent agent never responds
expected_behavior: Tool times out after 5 minutes with helpful error message
success_criteria: Error message mentions parent agent monitoring

prompt: Parent agent returns error in response
expected_behavior: Tool propagates parent error to user
success_criteria: RuntimeError raised with parent error message

expected_behavior: Tool respects count parameter minimum of 2
Tool respects count parameter maximum of 6

prompt: Verify delegation request format includes all required fields
expected_behavior: Request JSON has complete structure for parent agent

prompt: Verify system prompt matches screenshot-to-code exactly
expected_behavior: SYSTEM_PROMPT constant contains exact prompt for 85-90% accuracy

prompt: Check tool annotations for Lazy-MCP optimization
expected_behavior: Tool descriptions front-load key information for progressive disclosure

prompt: Verify logging goes to stderr, never stdout
expected_behavior: All logging uses stderr to avoid corrupting STDIO transport
success_criteria: No print() statements in tool code
